subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Quli! For every created thing there hath been and ever shall be a fragrance, and that fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل قلی هر شیی ء از اشیاء از برای او عرفی بوده و هست و آن عرف در
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
